metadata.title:
ITS THIRD.

A Rear End Wreck Occurs


at COnnell.

pages.raw_text:
The Northern Pacific railway suf-
fered it's third rear end collision
within two days at Connell, Wash,
yesterday.


The trains were again badly de-
layed and the equipment was much
damaged.


Various reasons are given for the
three rear-end collisions which have
taken place during the past two
days, but the consensus of opinion
places the responsibility on improp-
err Tagging.


The rules require flagman when
an unusual delay to his train is
anticipated to drop off mile from
the point of delay, place his torpedo
and remain there until called in.


1t was said yesterday among the
railway employees that the torpe-
does which We're used as an extra
precautiOn failed to explode.
